title: Marketplace Manager - HomeLane Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - HomeLane Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About HomeLane Ventures Solutions:
HomeLane Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane Ventures Solutions!
